sources.title: Fixation-related potentials reveal that confusing program code elicits a late frontal positivity

license.reason: The publication and Zenodo record explicitly release the experiment data under CC-BY-4.0.

sources.annotation_population: 24 experiment participants completing Java atoms-of-confusion comprehension trials
limitations: atoms-of-confusion task rather than general perceived readability

sources.title: Deslop M8 controlled cleanup and unsafe-near-miss pilot

license.reason: Project-owned benchmark protocol and generated metadata.

sources.annotation_population: mixed human and LLM-assisted cleanup producers plus deterministic unsafe-near-miss oracles; row authorship blinded
limitations: controlled oracle is not a human readability rating
producer mixture is preserved only as a dataset limitation, never a row feature

sources.title: A General Software Readability Model dataset mirror

license.reason: The observed dataset card provides no explicit redistribution license; public downloadability is insufficient authority to copy it.

limitations: snippet population differs from deslop's six-language target

sources.title: Themis-CodePreference

license.reason: The dataset card explicitly releases the dataset under Apache-2.0.

sources.annotation_population: pre-2019 permissively licensed merged commits selected by criterion classifiers and multi-model preference consensus
limitations: broad readability-and-maintainability target rather than direct human perceived-readability ratings
project identity is not exposed in the published row schema
selection and preference strength use learned or model-consensus components
